name: Restack
description: Restack — framework for building, deploying, and scaling AI agents. Durable workflows, observability, and event-driven orchestration in TypeScript.

seo.title: Restack — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Restack: Restack — framework for building, deploying, and scaling AI agents. Durable workflows, observability, and event-driven orchestration in TypeScript.

when_to_use: Orchestrating fault-tolerant AI agent workflows at production scale
Building durable pipelines that retry failed AI steps automatically
Managing complex multi-step LLM task execution with state engine
Deploying reliable agentic apps with observable workflow traces

pros: Durable workflows with retry and state
review.verdict: Appealing for TypeScript teams building agent systems, but weigh Temporal and Inngest for proven durability.
review.best_for: TypeScript teams building durable, event-driven AI agents
review.not_for: Python-first shops or users committed to Temporal

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
